pool.baseline:
Hey, I'm looking at the audit from the Rotterdam floor. We've got some discrepancies between the WMS and the physical count for the micro-controller units. Can you look at these numbers and help me figure out what might be happening?

Part # 882-X (Capacitors): System: 1,450 | Physical: 1,442
Part # 915-B (Sensors): System: 600 | Physical: 597
Part # 440-K (Circuit Boards): System: 2,100 | Physical: 2,085
Part # 112-A (Resistors): System: 12,000 | Physical: 11,988

The numbers are small but they happen every month. Any ideas on what we should check for?
